---
type: Reference
title: Dangling link source
---

This concept links to [a concept that does not exist](/missing/concept.md)
— per spec §5.3 a broken link is not malformed; it may represent
not-yet-written knowledge. It also links to [the orphan](/no_frontmatter.md),
which resolves.

```markdown
Links inside fenced code blocks are examples, not relationships:
[ignored](/empty_type.md)
```
